nasb.text: And blessed is she who believed that there would be a fulfillment of what had been spoken to her by the Lord.”

esv.text: And blessed is she who believed that there would be a fulfillment of what was spoken to her from the Lord.”

cnv.text: 這相信主傳給她的話必要成就的女子是有福的。”

ccb.text: 相信主所说的话必实现的女子有福了！”

csbs.text: 这相信的女子是蒙福的，因为主对她说的话都会实现。”
